label: Checkout Service
description: Orchestrates the end-to-end checkout flow for the online boutique. Receives a PlaceOrder request, retrieves the user's cart, resolves product prices, converts currencies, obtains a shipping quote, charges the credit card, ships the order, empties the cart, and sends an order confirmation email.
responsibilities: Orchestrate the multi-step checkout flow across six downstream services
Retrieve user cart items and resolve product prices from the catalog
Convert product prices and shipping costs to the user's requested currency
Obtain shipping quotes and initiate order shipment
Charge the customer's credit card for the total order amount
Empty the user's cart after successful payment and shipment
Send order confirmation emails (best-effort, failures are logged but do not abort the order)
Generate unique order IDs using UUIDs

technology.platform: Google Cloud (with optional Cloud Profiler and OpenTelemetry tracing)
